TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Dragan Bender == Dragan Bender hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa pzyang pkaki' tay kska'. kawas tay 1997, ryax sa tay 17 nqu tay 11, Dragan Bender, squliq na p'unro. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing qnxan na sraral 1997 kawas 11 byacing 17 ryax, Dragan Bender htgan November ru Čapljina,suruw lga,musa beh Herzegovina. 12 kawas lga,t'aring suruw mzyu mari maki Nikola Vujčić mzyu mari pqwasan biru. qnxan nya Bender's qsuyan mlikuy mzyu mari na pqwasan biru maki MarylandTerrapins . hiya pqbaq ke na ego maki mrkyas,mita ega na Amerika "rangi"ru "The Fresh Prince of Bel-Air" . cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: == *raɣan βen*er == *raɣan βen*er ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, qutux s~ɕa pzjaŋ pkakiʔ taj ks~ɕkaʔ. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, *raɣan βen*er, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ qnxan na s~ɕraral **** kawas~ɕ ** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax, *raɣan βen*er ħtɣan no*emβer ru *apljina,s~ɕuruw lɣa,mus~ɕa βeħ ħerzeɣo*ina. ** kawas~ɕ lɣa,tʔariŋ s~ɕuruw mzju mari maki nikola *uj*i* mzju mari pqwas~ɕan βiru. qnxan nja βen*erʔs~ɕ qs~ɕujan mlikuj mzju mari na pqwas~ɕan βiru maki marjlan*terrapins~ɕ . ħija pqβaq ke na eɣo maki mrkjas~ɕ,mita eɣa na amerika "raŋi"ru "tħe *res~ɕħ prinʦ~ʨe o* βel-air" . ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
S.FORM: == Dragan Bender == Dragan Bender hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa pzyang pkaki' tay kska'. kawas tay 1997, ryax sa tay 17 nqu tay 11, Dragan Bender, squliq na p'unro. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing qnxan na sraral 1997 kawas 11 byacing 17 ryax, Dragan Bender htgan November ru Čapljina,suruw lga,musa beh Herzegovina. 12 kawas lga,t'aring suruw mzyu mari maki Nikola Vujčić mzyu mari pqwasan biru. qnxan nya Bender's qsuyan mlikuy mzyu mari na pqwasan biru maki MarylandTerrapins . hiya pqbaq ke na ego maki mrkyas,mita ega na Amerika "rangi"ru "The Fresh Prince of Bel-Air" . cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: == *raɣan βen*er == *raɣan βen*er ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, qutux s~ɕa pzjaŋ pkakiʔ taj ks~ɕkaʔ. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, *raɣan βen*er, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ qnxan na s~ɕraral **** kawas~ɕ ** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax, *raɣan βen*er ħtɣan no*emβer ru *apljina,s~ɕuruw lɣa,mus~ɕa βeħ ħerzeɣo*ina. ** kawas~ɕ lɣa,tʔariŋ s~ɕuruw mzju mari maki nikola *uj*i* mzju mari pqwas~ɕan βiru. qnxan nja βen*erʔs~ɕ qs~ɕujan mlikuj mzju mari na pqwas~ɕan βiru maki marjlan*terrapins~ɕ . ħija pqβaq ke na eɣo maki mrkjas~ɕ,mita eɣa na amerika "raŋi"ru "tħe *res~ɕħ prinʦ~ʨe o* βel-air" . ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
